title: Jones Lang LaSalle is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Jones Lang LaSalle is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Jones Lang LaSalle, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Property Advisor for our Kanpur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Jones Lang LaSalle:
Jones Lang LaSalle is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Title Search

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jones Lang LaSalle!
